name: Fiber Telecom (FT)
notes:
## Our network highlights
.

* AS41327 is matching **RPKI** validation state and rejects invalids 'invalid == reject' (since March 2019)

* AS41327 accepts & honors community 65535:0 **GRACEFUL_SHUTDOWN** according to  [RFC8326](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc8326 "RFC8326 Doc")

* AS41327 accepts requests & encourages using 
BGP TTL security **GTSM** on peering sessions according to [RFC5082](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5082 "RFC5082 Doc")

* AS41327 accepts and configures **TCP-MD5** or **TCP-AO** (since January 2022) and/or **BFD** on BGP sessions, if requested

* AS41327 infrastructure is compliant with [**MANRS**](https://www.manrs.org/isps/participants/?gv_search=41327&mode=any) security indications

* AS41327 will announcing never via route servers in Italy

* Our network hosts also a **RIPE's K-Root** replica at Palermo (ns1.it-pmo.k.ripe.net) and a [**RIPE's Atlas Anchors**](https://atlas.ripe.net/probes/6762/) (it-pmo-as41327)

* MIX-IT router locations: Carini (PA), Milan and Rome

* NetIX router locations: Milan and Frankfurt

* DE-CIX Dusseldorf, Hamburg, Madrid, Marseille, Munich, New York, MSK-IX and NYIIX are backhauled to Frankfurt, Germany

* France-IX AURA is temporary backhauled to Turin, Italy

* LSIX, DATAIX and Global-IX are backhauled to Amsterdam, Netherlands 

* France-IX is backhauled to Cornaredo (MI), Italy

* LINX is backhauled to Frankfurt, Germany

* Namex Bari is backhauled to Rome, Italy

* We can evaluate PNIs request with minimum 1Gbps traffic in any direction

.
